title: Parajudica: A Metamodel and RDF/SPARQL-Based Reasoning System for Context-Dependent Data Compliance Assessments

creators.name: Moreau, Luc
creators.affiliation: University of Sussex, Brighton, United Kingdom

creators.name: Stalla-Bourdillon, Sophie
creators.affiliation: Brussels Privacy Hub, Vrije Universiteit Brussel, Brussels, Belgium

description: A metamodel and fixed-point inference system for context-dependent data classification and multi-framework compliance. The Python implementation is licensed under Apache-2.0; the vocabulary, ontologies, and data are licensed under CC-BY-4.0.
